case_title: SMITH, LENAITCHIA VS BARNES, LORNA MA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, LENAITCHIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARNES, LORNA MA $1,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $10.50 INTEREST, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,432.50, $10.50 IS INTEREST ON RENTAL DEPOSIT OF $1400.00. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, LENAITCHIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARNES, LORNA MA $2,697.50 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,719.50, THIS JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RENTAL DEPOSIT OF $3000, PLUS INTEREST ON SECURITY DEPOSIT; REDUCES BY TOTAL CHARGES OF $325 FOR CLEANING AND PARKING ASSESSMENT. DEFENDANT SHALL BE ENTITLED FOR FURTHER CREDIT FOR FUNDS RETURNED TO HOMELESS PRENATAL PROJECT OR OTHER AGENCIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
